item.title: About
item.description:
Deal Ledger is a curated deals site built around a simple idea: a deal recommendation should be useful before a reader clicks out to a retailer.

The project focuses on:

  • curated product picks instead of giant dumps of coupons
  • clear price context, including reference pricing and discount depth
  • category-specific email alerts so readers can follow the topics they actually care about
  • lightweight editorial guides that explain why a product or category is worth watching

The goal is to publish a focused stream of practical product picks with enough context to help readers decide whether a deal is worth their attention. Deal Ledger aims to feel selective, readable, and trustworthy rather than like a generic affiliate feed.

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Deal Ledger welcomes reader questions, correction requests, and business inquiries.

You can use the site’s request flows for:

  • feedback about deal listings or pricing notes
  • partnership or press outreach
  • questions about category alerts or site policies

Direct contact details are being finalized and will be added in a dedicated contact workflow.

item.title: Disclosure
item.description:
Deal Ledger may use affiliate links on some pages. That means the site may earn a commission from qualifying purchases at no additional cost to the reader.

Editorial coverage is intended to be based on relevance, value, and product fit for the categories covered on the site. A potential commission does not change the goal of publishing useful, selective recommendations with clear pricing context.

Prices, availability, and deal timing can change quickly. Readers should always confirm the current details on the retailer’s website before buying.

item.title: Privacy
item.description:
Deal Ledger is an editorial deals website. This page explains what information may be collected when you visit the site or contact us.

Information you may provide directly:

  • If you email Deal Ledger, we may receive your name, email address, and any information you include in your message.
  • If email alerts are enabled in the future, we may receive the information you submit through the signup form, such as your email address and category preferences.

Information collected automatically:

item.title: Noise-cancelling over-ears
item.description: Wireless ANC headphones with 30h battery and quick charge.

item.title: How we decide a discount is worth featuring
item.description: A short look at the editorial rules behind Deal Ledger’s product picks.

item.title: Best home office upgrades under $150
item.description: A roundup showing the kind of editorial content that can support the deals pages.

item.title: Runner's GPS smartwatch
item.description: Built-in GPS, heart-rate, and week-long battery for training.

item.title: Why category alerts matter more than a generic newsletter
item.description: Why readers should be able to subscribe to specific product categories.

item.title: 4K streaming stick
item.description: Dolby Vision streaming with voice remote and Wi‑Fi 6.

item.title: How to read deal pricing without getting played
item.description: A quick framework for deciding whether a sale price is genuinely useful or just dressed up to look urgent.

item.title: 34-inch ultrawide monitor
item.description: WQHD ultrawide panel with USB-C, 100Hz refresh, and adjustable stand.

item.title: The best categories for a small deals site to own
item.description: Why a focused deals brand usually grows faster by owning a few practical categories instead of trying to publish everything.

item.title: Compact mechanical keyboard
item.description: Hot-swappable 65% board with RGB and silent switches.

item.title: Why short deal pages can convert better than long reviews
item.description: A case for concise, high-intent deal pages that help shoppers decide quickly without turning every listing into a full editorial review.

item.title: Compact HEPA air purifier
item.description: Small-room purifier with HEPA filter, quiet sleep mode, and simple controls.

item.title: Waterproof Bluetooth speaker
item.description: Rugged IPX7 speaker with 12h battery and USB-C.

item.title: Adjustable dumbbell set
item.description: Space-saving weights adjustable from 5–50 lbs per hand.
